what: fak's OWN in-kernel pure-Go forward emits an adjudicated tool_use on the Anthropic /v1/messages wire Claude Code drives
serve: fak serve --gguf Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct.Q8_0.gguf --require-key-env (no --base-url, no shim, no proxy)
request: POST /v1/messages with x-api-key, one user turn + a list_files tool schema
before_this_change: stop_reason was always end_turn; the tool call stayed as TEXT in content (InKernelPlanner.Complete never set Message.ToolCalls), so Claude Code's agent loop had nothing to execute
the_fix: renderChatMLTools injects the tool JSON-schema into the folded system block + renders canonical <tool_call>/<tool_response> ChatML; InKernelPlanner.Complete runs normalizeCompletionToolCalls to lift the model's text-form Hermes <tool_call> to a structured call (fail-closed on a truncated call). The id prefix call_text_ is the lift's signature.
note: 1.5B used for a fast load; the path is model-independent (7B Q8 is the agentically-usable ceiling per BENCHMARK-AUTHORITY.md).
